title: Command Center — Automation registry and management UI
summary: This feature delivery ships a Pancreator-native automation registry and Command Center Automations management UI. The @pancreator/scheduler package validates schema v1 YAML, enforces path guards under .pan/automations/, and exposes registry CRUD plus enabled-only due filtering. Next.js routes at /api/automations wrap…
planning_context: handoff.handoff_note: Feature index links delivery report, accepted ship artifacts, and active work paths. After human acceptance, SDK advances to complete and delegates close-artifacts archival to librarian.

review.spec_contracts_note: contracts:from_feature deferred (exit 125); three embedded llm-judge UX contract blocks in ux-spec.md evaluated manually with contract run logs under .pan/work/contract-runs/.

intake.human_approval_note: Supervisor re-ratification at 2026-06-08T15:15:00Z with human_ratified_diff true after WCAG 4.1.2 delete-dialog focus-trap repair; all 30 touch-set paths staged with 35 bundled sibling Command Center infrastructure…
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
